Games Gallery

Whisp: Whisp is a game where you follow a child that ends up getting lost in a cave. In order to escape and find your pet, you need to delve deeper, with a whisp as a guide.

Brego Vs. Midnight: A simple turn-based combat game featuring my pets.

Game 3: Defuse the Bomb simulator.

Don’t Look Down (Itch.io Link)

Don’t Look Down is my senior project and an ongoing work-in-progress — a physics-based climbing adventure game set in a desolate, post-apocalyptic wasteland. The project is being developed in Unity with custom 3D assets built in Blender.

In the game, you take on the role of a lone climber accompanied by a robotic spider companion. Having left their family behind, the climber embarks on a perilous ascent inspired by an ancient belief: climb high enough, and you may uncover the truth about humanity’s downfall — and perhaps even reach the gods themselves.

Core Features (Planned & In Progress)

  • ⚙️ Physics-Based Climbing — left and right hand controls with IK hand-snapping.
  • 💪 Stamina System — every move drains endurance, forcing strategic climbing choices.
  • ☣️ Rising Radioactive Fog — dynamic pressure system that pushes the player upward.
  • 🤖 Robotic Companion — a spider-like ally that provides storage, a rest platform, and upgradeable tools.
  • 🌄 Procedurally Generated Mountains — ensuring each climb is a unique experience.
  • 🎨 Stylized, Hand-Painted Art Style for an atmospheric and cohesive aesthetic.

Development Progress

This page also serves as a development blog, where I post updates, prototypes, and reflections throughout the project lifecycle.

Completed Milestones

  • ✔️ Tutorial climbing gym prototype (Unity 6 + Blender).
  • ✔️ Basic stamina + physics-based climbing mechanics implemented.
  • ✔️ IK hand-snapping system for climbing holds.
  • ✔️ Camera system with smooth zoom and dynamic transitions.
  • ✔️ Early character model + mask created in Blender.

Next Steps

  • 🔄 Procedural mountain generation system.
  • 🎭 Character texturing, rigging, and animation.
  • 🤖 Modeling and implementation of robotic companion.
  • 🌫️ Fog and environmental hazard systems.
  • 🎬 Cutscenes and narrative sequences.
  • ✨ Additional polish, optimizations, and expanded content.
